items.title: JPMorgan discloses Solana ETF holdings: Is institutional interest in SOL rising?
items.whyYouShouldCare: JPMorgan's disclosure of Solana ETF holdings indicates a growing institutional interest, potentially enhancing SOL's credibility and market positioning.

items.title: Dartmouth endowment invests in Solana ETF, holds $14M in crypto exposure
items.whyYouShouldCare: Dartmouth's $14M investment in a Solana ETF reflects increasing institutional confidence in crypto, which could boost SOL's liquidity and ecosystem engagement.

items.title: Forward Industries posts over 300% revenue growth but wider quarterly net loss amid SOL markdowns
items.whyYouShouldCare: Forward Industries' significant revenue growth, despite losses linked to SOL markdowns, highlights the volatility of SOL's market impact on business performance.
